articles.title: Actor Ruby Rose alleges pop star Katy Perry sexually assaulted her in Australia in 2010 - NBC News
articles.description: Australian actor Ruby Rose accused pop star Katy Perry of sexually assaulting her a decade and a half ago in Melbourne and provincial police confirmed on Wednesday they’re investigating a “historical sexual assault.”When asked about Rose’s claims, Victoria Po…
